prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Celestia Vale, a feminine fallen princess in a modest travel dress, and Ren Silverbrook, a masculine guild coordinator in a formal cloak, stand at a wooden desk in warm tavern lighting. Celestia gracefully spreads an old quest map across the table and points to a specific mountain pass with her finger, looking at Ren with a determined expression. Anime style, high quality, consistent character designs, no text, no watermarks.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Silverbrook nods in agreement at the map location, picks up his heavy brass guild seal, and carefully presses it onto the quest map next to Celestia’s finger to authorize the mission. Celestia smiles slightly as the seal is placed. Consistent characters and camera angle, warm tavern atmosphere, anime style, no text, no watermarks.
